scripts.test:unit: tsc --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir .test-dist --rootDir src src/payloadBuilders.ts src/types.ts && node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('.test-dist/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && node --test tests/payloadBuilders.test.cjs
